task_completion.description: Access OrientDB Studio and connect to the demodb database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio web interface is visible in the browser, and the active database shown in the top navigation or connection screen is 'demodb'.

task_completion.description: Create the HotelMaintenanceFlag vertex class with a unique index.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema tab or query execution history shows 'HotelMaintenanceFlag' created as a Vertex class (extends V). Evidence of a unique index should be visible in the schema properties/indexes list or via a CREATE INDEX query.
The Schema tab or query execution history shows 'RequiresMaintenance' created as an Edge class (extends E).

task_completion.description: Create HotelMaintenanceFlag records with correct CRITICAL, HIGH, or STANDARD priorities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Browse tab (query results) or Graph tab shows HotelMaintenanceFlag records containing a priority field set to 'CRITICAL', 'HIGH', or 'STANDARD'. Look for query results indicating 15 total records were created.

task_completion.description: Link each HotelMaintenanceFlag to its corresponding Hotel via a RequiresMaintenance edge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graph visualization shows directed edges (arrows) labeled 'RequiresMaintenance' connecting HotelMaintenanceFlag vertices to Hotel vertices, OR query results show edge creation (e.g., CREATE EDGE) or edge properties (in/out fields) linking the two classes.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OrientDB Studio UI in a web browser (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), rather than just running terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual database and did not just mock the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Results, schemas, and graphs should be displayed within the OrientDB Studio interface (Browse, Schema, or Graph tabs), not in a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent derived the priorities using queries or manual inspection rather than blindly pasting a pre-computed list.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for SQL queries in the Browse tab that use conditional logic (e.g., IF, UPDATE... WHERE Stars = 5) or evidence of the agent checking hotel properties before assigning priorities.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 15 hotels in demodb. Expected priority assignments: 6 CRITICAL (5-star Luxury/Palace hotels, e.g., Hotel Adlon Kempinski, The Savoy), 6 HIGH (other 5-star hotels, e.g., The Plaza Hotel, Copacabana Palace), and 3 STANDARD (<5 star hotels, e.g., Hotel Artemide, Melia Berlin). The maintenance batch is 'maint_q1_2026' and the last inspection year is 2024.
